name: luca-gstack
description: AI Design Workflow OS for CRM product design

scripts.lint:yaml: python3 -c "import sys, yaml; [yaml.safe_load(open(f)) for f in sys.argv[1:]]" .claude/workflow-state.yaml .claude/skill-os/optional-workflow-graph.yaml .claude/skill-os/input-modes.yaml
scripts.check:hooks: node --check .claude/hooks/session-restore.mjs && node --check .claude/hooks/route-guard.mjs && node --check .claude/hooks/post-edit.mjs && node --check .claude/hooks/session-sync.mjs && node scripts/test-hooks.mjs
